title: Sweet-Savory Saudi Meat Stir-fry
description: A delicious and quick weeknight meal featuring a unique blend of spices including Cajun seasoning to create a sweet-savory dish that is both flavorful and comforting.
instructions: Prepare the beef by trimming excess fat and season with kosher salt and black pepper. Slice into thin strips.
Dice red bell peppers, onions, and slice garlic thinly.
Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add cayenne pepper for color and fragrance.
Add beef and cook until browned on all sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add tomato paste and stir to combine with some of the residual fat. Cook until it turns a deep red color.
Return beef to the pan along with bell peppers, onions, and garlic. Stir in sweet soy sauce.
Simmer for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender and flavors are well combined.
Serve hot as a main dish.
